description: Add a review comment to the top-level requirement in the SRS document of the Example Project. The comment text must be: "Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12."

metadata.expected_text: Acceptance criteria are missing for this requirement. The testing team needs measurable pass/fail conditions before this can be approved. Please update by end of sprint 12.
